MINI MINUTES: Appearances on THURS, AUG-28-2008: Marina R. Franco, counsel appearing on behalf of David Wasserman, Esq. representing plaintiff Burke-Lewis Apartments; Chris Kindler, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Michael P. Monagle, counsel by limited scope representation for defendant Tracy Ashraezaden aka Tracy Shellenberg, who is also present

Settlement conference is held; case is settled. The SEP-02-2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
